step_rationale: Mitochondrial DAMP; T-cell antigen; proatherogenic factor in plaque inflammation.
mechanism: Heat-shock protein 60 released from damaged mitochondria acts as a pathogen-associated molecular pattern to initiate and sustain atherosclerotic inflammation.

references.title: Mitochondrial DAMPs and altered mitochondrial dynamics in OxLDL burden in atherosclerosis.
Molecular signature of coronary stent thrombosis: oxidative stress and innate immunity cells.
The role of heat shock proteins in atherosclerosis.
